fields.name: theme_cf_reference
fields.label: Brand Theme
fields.description: Select the Brand Theme Content Fragment. Only applies when Theme in the dropdown below is set to default

fields.name: theme
fields.label: Theme
fields.description: This takes priority over CF based theme except when default is selected.

fields.name: js-files
fields.label: JS Library URL(s)
fields.description: List of js libraries to include under head section of the page

fields.name: name
fields.label: Section Name
fields.description: The label shown for this section in the Content Tree

fields.name: sec-spacing
fields.label: Spacing Top (padding top)
fields.description: Section top spacing, default is 32px.

fields.name: sec-spacing-bottom
fields.label: Spacing Bottom (padding bottom)
fields.description: Section bottom spacing, default is 32px.

fields.name: icon
fields.label: Icon Image
fields.description: Optional small image shown before the button label.

fields.name: contentFragmentVariation
fields.label: Selected Variation
fields.description: Persisted variation for publish; leave empty for master.

fields.name: reference
fields.label: Default Content Fragment
fields.description: The default content fragment to display. At runtime, Adobe Target replaces this with a personalized offer for the audience, if configured.

fields.name: contentFragmentVariation
fields.label: Selected Variation
fields.description: Persisted variation for publish; leave empty for master.

fields.name: mbox
fields.label: Target Mbox Name
fields.description: The Adobe Target mbox name for personalization. Default is: 'target-global-mbox'.

fields.name: bgColor
fields.label: Background Color
fields.description: Optional CSS color (hex, rgb, or var). When set, the title appears in a colored band. Examples: #0a66c2, rgb(10,102,194), var(--main-accent-color)

fields.name: assetFolder
fields.label: Asset Folder
fields.description: DAM folder to list. All files inside this folder are listed automatically. Leave empty if you want to pick individual files below.

fields.name: individualAssets
fields.label: Individual Files
fields.description: Pick one or more files from AEM Assets — can span multiple folders. When set, this takes priority over Asset Folder.

fields.name: fileTypes
fields.label: File Types
fields.description: MIME type prefixes or extensions to include (e.g. application/pdf, pdf, doc, xls). Leave empty to include all.

fields.name: limit
fields.label: Max Items
fields.description: 0 = no limit

fields.name: downloadLabel
fields.label: Download Button Label
fields.description: Optional text next to the download icon. Leave empty to show only the icon.

fields.name: bgColor
fields.label: Background Color
fields.description: CSS color for the block background (hex, rgb, or var). Example: #ffffff

fields.name: textColor
fields.label: Text Color
fields.description: CSS color for the text (hex, rgb, or var). Example: #1f1f1f

fields.label: Enable Underline in Title
fields.description: Enable underline for H1 elements in your text
fields.name: enableunderline
ctalabel
fields.label: CTA Button Label
fields.description: Text shown on the call-to-action button. Leave empty to hide the button.

fields.name: ctalink
fields.label: CTA Button Link
fields.description: Target page or URL for the call-to-action button.

fields.name: badge
fields.label: Badge / Highlight Text
fields.description: Optional pill-style label shown above the title.

fields.name: preset
fields.label: Preset
fields.description: Preset to be applied to the image. This preset needs to exist on the DM account if using any account other than DynamicMediaNA

fields.name: extend
fields.label: Extend
fields.description: Provide value in Left,top,right,bottom format e.g. 10,10,10,10 to add a 10 pixel padding on all sides

fields.name: borderbgcolor
fields.label: Border Color
fields.description: Provide hexcode of the color without # e.g. FFFFFF

fields.name: rotate
fields.label: Rotate
fields.description: Select the rotation which will rotate the image.

fields.name: flip
fields.label: Flip
fields.description: Select the flip for the image either vertical or horizontal or vertical & horizontal

fields.name: crop
fields.label: Crop
fields.description: Crop the final image using four values: left, top, width, and height, all in percentages. For example, 10p,10p,50p,50p means crop the image starting 10% from the left and top, and take 50% of the image's width and height

fields.name: showInfoIcon
fields.label: DM Playground
fields.description: Show an icon on the image(top right) that opens selected image in the DM Playground tool(Snapshot) for previewing image transformations

fields.name: videoTitle
fields.label: Video Title / Alt Text
fields.description: Accessible title for the video

fields.name: autoplay
fields.label: Autoplay
fields.description: Automatically start playing the video when loaded (will be muted for browser compatibility)

fields.name: loop
fields.label: Loop
fields.description: Loop the video continuously

fields.name: muted
fields.label: Muted
fields.description: Start the video muted

fields.name: pageSize
fields.label: Results Per Page
fields.description: Number of search results to show per page in the expanded results view.

fields.name: assetSearchPath
fields.label: Asset Search Path
fields.description: Optional DAM folder to include in search results (e.g. /content/dam/my-site). Assets are returned alongside pages — images render as thumbnails, documents as icons.

fields.name: excludeAssetPaths
fields.label: Excluded Asset Paths
fields.description: Comma- or newline-separated DAM paths to exclude from asset search results. Any asset whose path starts with one of these prefixes is dropped. Example: /content/dam/my-site/internal, /content/dam/my-site/drafts

fields.name: autoplay
fields.label: Auto-slide
fields.description: Automatically advance to the next slide on a timer. Pauses on hover.

fields.name: autoplayInterval
fields.label: Auto-slide Interval
fields.description: Time between slides when Auto-slide is on.

fields.name: imageZoom
fields.label: Image Zoom Effect
fields.description: Applies to all cards in this carousel.
Any direct full URL of publicly available video. e.g. video URL of aem publish instance, Dynamic Media etc.
fields.name: videoUrl
fields.label: Video Url

fields.name: iframeUrl
fields.label: iFrame URL
fields.description: Please provide a URL to an iFrame app.

fields.name: config_source
fields.label: Template Config Source
fields.description: Choose the source to provide the template path and variable configurations.

fields.name: dm_template_url
fields.label: Template Path
fields.description: Provide full URL for the Dynamic Media Template. Templates should have variables which can be configured in Variable Mappings field.

fields.name: var_mapping
fields.label: Variable Mappings
fields.description: Provide variable values. These values should be exposed in the DM template inorder to get replaced e.g. $leftImage=DynamicMediaNA/adobestock-167833331

fields.name: videoReference
fields.label: Video Reference
fields.description: Provide a URL for the video background.

fields.name: btn-link
fields.label: Button Link
fields.description: Path to linked AEM content

fields.label: Enable Swoosh Effect
fields.description: Enable Circular effect on the component
fields.name: useSwoosh
